tabs.content:
bikerentaldb
| where ingestion_time() > ago(5m)
| summarize arg_max(ingestion_time(), No_Bikes, No_Empty_Docks) by BikepointID, Street, Neighbourhood
| extend total_docks = No_Bikes + No_Empty_Docks
| summarize
    total_stations = dcount(BikepointID),
    empty_stations = countif(No_Bikes == 0),
    full_stations = countif(No_Empty_Docks == 0),
    avg_utilization = round(avg(iff(total_docks == 0, 0.0, todouble(No_Bikes) / todouble(total_docks))) * 100, 1),
    total_bikes = sum(No_Bikes),
    total_empty_docks = sum(No_Empty_Docks)
tabs.title: Fleet KPIs

tabs.content:
bikerentaldb
| where ingestion_time() > ago(5m)
| summarize arg_max(ingestion_time(), No_Bikes, No_Empty_Docks) by BikepointID, Street, Neighbourhood, Latitude, Longitude
| extend total_docks = No_Bikes + No_Empty_Docks
| extend availability_pct = iff(total_docks == 0, 0.0, round(todouble(No_Bikes) / todouble(total_docks) * 100, 1))
| extend status = case(
    No_Bikes == 0, "EMPTY",
    No_Empty_Docks == 0, "FULL",
    availability_pct < 20, "LOW",
    availability_pct > 80, "HIGH",
    "NORMAL"
  )
| project BikepointID, Street, Neighbourhood, No_Bikes, No_Empty_Docks, total_docks, availability_pct, status, Latitude, Longitude
| order by availability_pct asc
tabs.title: Live Station Status

tabs.content:
bikerentaldb
| where ingestion_time() > ago(10m)
| summarize arg_max(ingestion_time(), No_Bikes, No_Empty_Docks) by BikepointID, Street, Neighbourhood, Latitude, Longitude
| extend total_docks = No_Bikes + No_Empty_Docks
| where No_Bikes <= 2 or No_Empty_Docks <= 2
| extend urgency = case(
    No_Bikes == 0, "CRITICAL - No bikes",
    No_Empty_Docks == 0, "CRITICAL - Full",
    No_Bikes <= 2, "WARNING - Low bikes",
    No_Empty_Docks <= 2, "WARNING - Almost full",
    "MONITOR"
  )
| extend target_bikes = iff(total_docks == 0, 0, toint(round(todouble(total_docks) * 0.5)))
| extend bikes_needed = target_bikes - No_Bikes
| project BikepointID, Street, Neighbourhood, No_Bikes, No_Empty_Docks, urgency, bikes_needed
| order by No_Bikes asc
| take 50
tabs.title: Rebalancing Alerts

tabs.content:
bikerentaldb
| where ingestion_time() > ago(6h)
| extend total_docks = No_Bikes + No_Empty_Docks
| extend utilization_pct = iff(total_docks == 0, 0.0, todouble(No_Bikes) / todouble(total_docks))
| summarize
    avg_bikes = round(avg(No_Bikes), 1),
    avg_utilization = round(avg(utilization_pct) * 100, 1),
    critical_events = countif(No_Bikes <= 2 or No_Empty_Docks <= 2),
    stations_reporting = dcount(BikepointID)
    by time_bin = bin(ingestion_time(), 5m)
| order by time_bin asc
tabs.title: Availability Trend

tabs.content:
bikerentaldb
| where ingestion_time() > ago(6h)
| extend total_docks = No_Bikes + No_Empty_Docks
| extend utilization_pct = iff(total_docks == 0, 0.0, todouble(No_Bikes) / todouble(total_docks))
| summarize
    avg_bikes = round(avg(No_Bikes), 1),
    avg_utilization = round(avg(utilization_pct) * 100, 1),
    critical_events = countif(No_Bikes <= 2 or No_Empty_Docks <= 2),
    stations_reporting = dcount(BikepointID)
    by time_bin = bin(ingestion_time(), 5m)
| order by time_bin asc
tabs.title: Availability Trend

tabs.content:
bikerentaldb
| where ingestion_time() > ago(24h)
| extend total_docks = No_Bikes + No_Empty_Docks
| extend utilization_pct = iff(total_docks == 0, 0.0, todouble(No_Bikes) / todouble(total_docks))
| extend is_critical = No_Bikes <= 2 or No_Empty_Docks <= 2
| summarize
    event_count = count(),
    avg_utilization = round(avg(utilization_pct) * 100, 1),
    critical_events = countif(is_critical),
    empty_events = countif(No_Bikes == 0),
    unique_stations = dcount(BikepointID)
    by time_bin = bin(ingestion_time(), 1h), Neighbourhood
| extend hour_of_day = datetime_part("Hour", time_bin)
| extend is_rush = hour_of_day between (7 .. 9) or hour_of_day between (17 .. 19)
| order by time_bin asc, Neighbourhood asc
tabs.title: Hourly Demand Trend

tabs.content:
bikerentaldb
| where ingestion_time() > ago(24h)
| summarize
    total_checks = count(),
    available_checks = countif(No_Bikes > 0),
    empty_checks = countif(No_Bikes == 0),
    avg_bikes = round(avg(No_Bikes), 1),
    min_bikes = min(No_Bikes),
    first_seen = min(ingestion_time()),
    last_seen = max(ingestion_time())
    by BikepointID, Street, Neighbourhood
| extend sla_pct = iff(total_checks == 0, 0.0, round(todouble(available_checks) / todouble(total_checks) * 100, 2))
| extend sla_status = case(
    sla_pct >= 95, "COMPLIANT",
    sla_pct >= 80, "AT RISK",
    "BREACHED"
  )
| project BikepointID, Street, Neighbourhood, sla_pct, sla_status, total_checks, available_checks, empty_checks, avg_bikes
| order by sla_pct asc
| take 200
tabs.title: Neighbourhood Heatmap

tabs.content:
let baseline = bikerentaldb
| where ingestion_time() between (ago(24h) .. ago(1h))
| summarize
    baseline_avg_bikes = avg(No_Bikes),
    baseline_std = stdev(No_Bikes)
    by BikepointID;
let recent = bikerentaldb
| where ingestion_time() > ago(30m)
| summarize
    recent_avg_bikes = avg(No_Bikes),
    recent_events = count(),
    latest_update = max(ingestion_time())
    by BikepointID, Street, Neighbourhood;
recent
| join kind=inner baseline on BikepointID
| extend z_score = round(
    (recent_avg_bikes - baseline_avg_bikes) / iff(baseline_std < 0.01, 1.0, baseline_std), 2)
| where abs(z_score) > 2.0
| extend anomaly_type = case(
    z_score > 2, "SURGE - Unusual accumulation",
    z_score < -2, "DRAIN - Unusual depletion",
    "NORMAL"
  )
| project BikepointID, Street, Neighbourhood, recent_avg_bikes = round(recent_avg_bikes, 1), baseline_avg_bikes = round(baseline_avg_bikes, 1), z_score, anomaly_type, recent_events
| order by abs(z_score) desc
| take 50
tabs.title: Anomaly Detection

tabs.content:
.alter-merge table weather_events (
    weather_description: string,
    has_precipitation: bool,
    relative_humidity: real,
    location_name: string,
    is_daytime: bool,
    precip_past_1h_mm: real,
    icon_code: string,
    uv_index: real,
    cloud_ceiling_m: real,
    cloud_cover_pct: real,
    pressure_mb: real,
    visibility_km: real,
    dew_point_c: real,
    wind_gust_kmh: real,
    wind_direction_desc: string
)

.alter-merge table weather_events (
    has_precipitation: string,
    is_daytime: string
)

.alter-merge table weather_events (
    temperature_c: real,
    feels_like_c: real,
    wind_direction_deg: real
)

.alter-merge table weather_events (
    has_precipitation: string,
    is_daytime: string,
    temperature_c: real,
    feels_like_c: real,
    wind_direction_deg: real
)

.drop column weather_events.has_precipitation

.drop column weather_events.is_daytime


.alter-merge table weather_events (
    has_precipitation: string,
    is_daytime: string,
    temperature_c: real,
    feels_like_c: real,
    wind_direction_deg: real
)

.show table weather_events schema as json

weather_events | take 10

weather_events
| extend icon_code_int = toint(parse_json(icon_code).value)

// Step 1: Create a clean target table
.create table weather_events_clean (
    observation_time: string,
    weather_description: string,
    relative_humidity: real,
    location_name: string,
    precip_past_1h_mm: real,
    icon_code: int,
    uv_index: real,
    cloud_ceiling_m: real,
    cloud_cover_pct: real,
    pressure_mb: real,
    visibility_km: real,
    dew_point_c: real,
    wind_gust_kmh: real,
    wind_direction_desc: string,
    temperature_c: real,
    feels_like_c: real,
    wind_direction_deg: real,
    has_precipitation: bool,
    is_daytime: bool
)

// Step 2: Create a function that transforms the data
.create function weather_events_transform() {
    weather_events
    | extend icon_code_clean = toint(parse_json(icon_code).value)
    | extend has_precip_clean = tobool(has_precipitation)
    | extend is_day_clean = tobool(is_daytime)
    | project 
        observation_time, weather_description, relative_humidity, location_name,
        precip_past_1h_mm, icon_code = icon_code_clean, uv_index, cloud_ceiling_m,
        cloud_cover_pct, pressure_mb, visibility_km, dew_point_c, wind_gust_kmh,
        wind_direction_desc, temperature_c, feels_like_c, wind_direction_deg,
        has_precipitation = has_precip_clean, is_daytime = is_day_clean
}

// Step 3: Attach update policy - auto-transforms every new row
.alter table weather_events_clean policy update @'[{"Source": "weather_events", "Query": "weather_events_transform()", "IsEnabled": true}]'



weather_events_clean
| take 10

let filterNeighbourhood = _selectedNeighbourhood;
let latest_weather = weather_events_clean
    | summarize arg_max(observation_time, has_precipitation, temperature_c, wind_gust_kmh) by location_name
    | take 1;
let has_precip = toscalar(latest_weather | project has_precipitation);
let current_temp = toscalar(latest_weather | project temperature_c);
let current_wind = toscalar(latest_weather | project wind_gust_kmh);
let weather_risk_label = case(
    has_precip == true, "High - Rain detected",
    current_temp < 5, "Medium - Cold weather",
    current_wind > 40, "Medium - High wind",
    "Low");
bikerentaldb
| where ingestion_time() between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where filterNeighbourhood == "" or Neighbourhood == filterNeighbourhood
| summarize arg_max(ingestion_time(), No_Bikes, No_Empty_Docks) by BikepointID, Street, Neighbourhood
| extend total_docks = No_Bikes + No_Empty_Docks
| extend utilization = iff(total_docks == 0, 0.0, round(100.0 * todouble(No_Bikes) / todouble(total_docks), 1))
| extend weather_risk = weather_risk_label
| extend rebalance_priority = case(
    No_Bikes == 0 and weather_risk startswith "High", "URGENT",
    No_Bikes <= 2 and weather_risk startswith "High", "HIGH",
    No_Bikes == 0, "MEDIUM",
    No_Bikes <= 2, "LOW",
    "OK")
| where rebalance_priority != "OK"
| project BikepointID, Street, Neighbourhood, No_Bikes, No_Empty_Docks, utilization, weather_risk, rebalance_priority
| order by rebalance_priority asc

weather_events_clean
| take weather_events_clean
| extend obs_time = todatetime(observation_time)
| where obs_time between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| top 1 by obs_time desc
| project 
    obs_time,
    weather_condition,
    temperature_c,
    feels_like_c,
    humidity_pct,
    wind_speed_kph,
    cloud_cover_pct



weather_events_clean
| getschema

bikerentaldb
| where ingestion_time() between (ago(1h) .. now())
| summarize arg_max(ingestion_time(), *) by BikepointID
| extend total = No_Bikes + No_Empty_Docks
| extend utilization = iff(total == 0, 0.0, round(100.0 * todouble(No_Bikes) / todouble(total), 1))
| summarize 
    below_20 = countif(utilization < 20),
    below_30 = countif(utilization < 30),
    below_50 = countif(utilization < 50),
    above_50 = countif(utilization >= 50),
    total_stations = count()


bikerentaldb
| summarize arg_max(ingestion_time(), *) by BikepointID
| extend total = No_Bikes + No_Empty_Docks
| extend utilization = iff(total == 0, 0.0, round(100.0 * todouble(No_Bikes) / todouble(total), 1))
| summarize 
    below_30 = countif(utilization < 30),
    below_40 = countif(utilization < 40),
    below_50 = countif(utilization < 50),
    above_50 = countif(utilization >= 50),
    avg_util = round(avg(utilization), 1),
    total_stations = count()


bikerentaldb
| summarize neighbourhood_count = dcount(Neighbourhood)

bikerentaldb
| summarize station_count = dcount(BikepointID)


weather_events_clean
| take 5

geo_station_hotspots
| where Gi_Bin > 1 or Gi_Bin < -1
| take 10

weather_events_clean | getschema
